name: Italian Pasta n' Cheese
recipeInstructions:
To prepare dressing, combine oil, vinegar, sugar, basil leaves, oregano, and black pepper in a tight-fitting jar with lid. Shake well until combined.
Cook rotini according to package directions. Rinse with cold water and drain before using.
To prepare salad, combine cooked rotini, broccoli pieces, shredded mozzarella cheese, onions, and bell peppers in a mixing bowl. Stir until everything is evenly distributed.
Gently stir the dressing into the salad mixture. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least two hours to allow flavors to meld.
